title: Touhou Origins: Blessings
description: An add-on for the Origins mod which adds blessings inspired by the Touhou Project series
body:
## Touhou Origins: Blessings An add-on for the [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) mod inspired by the [Touhou Project](https://en.touhouwiki.net/wiki/Touhou_Wiki) series. In addition to choosing an origin, you now also choose a blessing, which will buff (or debuff) your character in unique ways.
Currently includes the following blessings and curses Regular (does nothing) Hakurei Moriya Scarlet Eientei Knowledge Beast Spirits High Stakes (curse) Permadeath (curse)
[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) *Disclaimer: This is a fan work based on Touhou Project. Touhou Project and its characters are the property of Team Shanghai Alice (ZUN).*
